data.title: Big Joe Forklifts launches Big Joe Financial Services to aid dealers & customers in financing forklifts, warehouse equipment.联Competitive options by PNC Vendor Finance, Verdant Commercial Capital, Mitsubishi HC Capital America.
data.description: Big Joe Forklifts has introduced Big Joe Financial Services (BJFS) in Madison, Wisconsin, to offer financing solutions for their complete range of forklifts, warehouse equipment, and autonomous solutions. The new service aims to provide competitive financing options to dealers and end-users. BJFS has partnered with renowned financing providers including PNC Vendor Finance, Verdant Commercial Capital, and Mitsubishi HC Capital America. This initiative seeks to facilitate equipment access and drive sales, with trusted financial support available to dealers and customers.
FTSE 100 OWNER SAID TO EYE EASING ENTRY RULES FOR FOREIGN FIRMS

data.title: 10Bridge is prepared to support CMS's Rural Health Transformation Program with their interoperability platform, helping with IT modernization goals.
data.description: A cloud-native interoperability platform and embedded service, specialized in healthcare, is aiding CMS RHT's IT modernization objectives for intricate healthcare data settings. On Jan. 20, 2026, in CARROLLTON, Georgia, 10Bridge revealed its preparedness to assist state entities.

data.title: Enhanced Games adds 5 renowned weightlifters to competition, including 3 Olympians and 2 Pan-Am Games Champions.
data.description: Five new athletes, including Yoni Andica, Arley Mendez, Leidy Solis, Juan Solis, and Maryam Usman, have entered the upcoming competition. Among them are three Olympians and two Pan-Am Games champions. The event, to be held on January 20, 2026, in New York, will feature a diverse international field. Enhanced, a prominent company specializing in elite sports competitions and performance products, is organizing the event.

data.title: NSF appoints Haan as SVP Global Divisions, Boks as VP Water, Shiver as VP Corporate Dev to fuel Blueprint 2030 strategy.
data.description: Ann Arbor, Michigan - NSF has recently made significant leadership changes to enhance its global operations and advance its Blueprint 2030 strategy. Starting from January 1, Steve Haan has been promoted to Senior Vice President, Global Divisions at NSF. Additionally, Vincent Boks will be taking over as Vice President of Water, while Hampton Shiver has been appointed as Vice President of Corporate Development. These changes are aimed at boosting NSF's capabilities on a global scale and driving the implementation of its new strategy.

data.title: ClickHouse secures $400M Series D led by Dragoneer for expansion in analytics and AI infrastructure.
data.description: A tech company based in San Francisco known as ClickHouse, specializing in real-time analytics, data warehousing, observability, and AI/ML, recently completed its Series D funding round. The company successfully secured $400 million in this funding round, with Dragoneer Investment Group leading the investment. Other notable participants in this round include Bessemer Venture Partners, GIC, Index Ventures, Khosla Ventures, Lightspeed Venture Partners, accounts advised by T. Rowe Price Associates, Inc., and WCM Investment Management. This funding comes on the heels of a period of rapid growth and acceleration for ClickHouse.

data.title: Covenant Clearinghouse, LLC wins summary judgment in New Mexico, preserving Declaration of Covenant & capital recovery fee.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on January 20, 2026, Covenant Clearinghouse, LLC stated that a New Mexico District Court dismissed a motion for summary judgment from the opposing party that aimed to nullify a Declaration of Covenant introducing a capital recovery fee. Every argument made by the opposing party was dismissed by the court.

data.title: Intravascular Temperature Management Market to reach $2.5B by 2033 with 8.9% CAGR, driven by rising demand from cardiac arrest, trauma, surgical cases.
data.description: The market for intravascular temperature management is expected to experience continuous growth due to increasing clinical need from cardiac arrest, trauma cases, and complex surgeries that necessitate accurate core-body temperature control for enhancing neurological and post-operative results. This growth is being fueled by a surge in demand for these procedures, particularly for patients requiring precise thermal regulation in critical situations.

data.title: Property Management and Real Estate Software Market experiences growth driven by digitalization, cloud platforms, and operational efficiency needs.
data.description: The Property Management and Real Estate Software Market is experiencing significant growth due to the fast-paced digital transformation in the real estate industry. The sector is witnessing a surge in the adoption of cloud-based platforms and a growing demand for enhanced operational efficiency. Property owners and managers are increasingly utilizing advanced software solutions to streamline their processes and improve overall productivity.Global market data shows that the Property Management and Real Estate Software Market has been growing steadily, with an estimated market value of $XX billion in recent years. This growth trend is expected to continue as more companies recognize the benefits of implementing technology-driven solutions in their property management operations.

data.title: Pharmacy Automation Systems Market driven by need to reduce errors, enhance efficiency - Market Research Intellect.
data.description: The Pharmacy Automation Systems Market is experiencing significant growth due to the increasing demand for reducing medication errors, enhancing patient safety, and improving operational efficiency in hospitals and retail pharmacies. This trend is being influenced by a rise in prescription volumes, workforce shortages, and greater adoption of digital technologies. Globally, the market is projected to reach a value of $5.5 billion by 2025, reflecting a compound annual growth rate of 8.3% from 2020 to 2025. The adoption of pharmacy automation systems is expected to continue to rise as the healthcare industry prioritizes patient care quality and safety.

data.title: G-CON Manufacturing Inc. appoints Robert Pedersen as President and CEO, bringing over 15 years of experience.
data.description: In College Station, Texas, on January 20, 2026, G-CON Manufacturing Inc., renowned for its prefabricated and modular cleanroom systems worldwide, disclosed the selection of Robert Pedersen as their new President and CEO. Possessing over 15 years of expertise in executive management, Pedersen's appointment marks a significant development for the company.

data.title: Michael Allain named Chief Revenue Officer at Red Oak, bringing 20+ years experience in financial services sales.
data.description: An experienced revenue leader with a background in scaling high-performance sales teams in regulated financial services industries has joined the Red Oak team in Austin, Texas. The individual brings decades of expertise to the role. Red Oak is recognized as the sole contemporary compliance connectivity platform, linking various aspects for seamless operations. The announcement was made on January 20, 2026.

data.title: DragoBet launches multi-regional casino & sportsbook platform with customizable features, Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: In Larnaca, Cyprus on January 20, 2026, the DragoBet online casino and sportsbook was officially launched. This service is tailored for use in various markets, adapting language, currency, and payment preferences based on region. The platform offers casino games and sports betting options.

data.title: Malaysia data center market valued at $6.14B in 2025, projected to reach $11.40B by 2031, 51 operational data centers.
data.description: A recent report on the Malaysia Data Center Market indicates promising growth opportunities from 2026 to 2031. Valued at USD 6.14 billion in 2025, the market is expected to reach USD 11.40 billion by 2031, with a projected CAGR of 10.86%. Currently, there are approximately 51 operational colocation data centers in Malaysia, with many being developed to meet Tier III standards. Cyberjaya emerges as a prominent location for data center infrastructure.

data.title: Europe's cold chain market to expand by $94.8 billion from 2026-2030, with a CAGR of 12.5%, as per new report. Incorporates outlook, trends and vendor landscape.
data.description: Dublin - A recent report on the Cold Chain Market in Europe predicts significant growth for the region, with a projected expansion of USD 94.8 billion between 2025 and 2030. The market is expected to experience a strong Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.5%. This analysis offers insights into market size, forecasts, trends, growth drivers, challenges, and profiles about 25 vendors in the industry. The current market scenario indicates substantial growth potential for the cold chain sector in Europe.

data.title: Ardagh Group S.A.'s Q4 2025 investor call set on Feb 26, 2026, with annual report to be posted online at midday GMT.
data.description: Luxembourg, January 20th, 2026 - Ardagh Group S.A. is set to conduct its investor call for the Fourth Quarter and Full Year of 2025 on Thursday, February 26th, 2026. The company will release its 2025 annual report on the same day, around midday GMT (07:00 EST). Investors and stakeholders can access the report on Ardagh Group S.A.'s website.

data.title: At Davos, A.I. and Big Tech overshadow all, with Trump in the spotlight. World Economic Forum sees tech giants taking control.
data.description: Global technology companies currently hold significant influence within the World Economic Forum, overshadowing the involvement of most other parties.

data.title: Cosmos Health reports $40M annual revenue boost, growing customer base & robotic expansion at Cosmofarm in Greece.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Cosmos Health Inc. disclosed its sustained operational progress and enhanced infrastructure development at Cosmofarm, its pharmaceutical distribution arm based in Greece. Operating as a diversified healthcare conglomerate, Cosmos Health, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol COSM, focuses on global integration. The expansion efforts signify a strategic move towards bolstering its pharmaceutical distribution capabilities within the region.
